## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out (breaking changes, follow-ups, trade-offs).
